response.step_by_step_log: I reviewed the video, identifying the primary musical segment starting at 04:09 featuring the song "Fortune Spinner". I performed a web search using the query: "Fortune Spinner" Hololive Myth lyrics to confirm song details. As the song is in English, both original and translated lyrics are the same. I successfully mapped the scenes and generated the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: This video is a stream celebrating the 5th anniversary of Hololive English -Myth-. The segment primarily features dialogue from the members (Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, and Ninomae Ina'nis), followed by a performance of their song "Fortune Spinner" with on-screen lyrics.

scenes.description: The song "Fortune Spinner" is played with on-screen lyrics displayed.
scenes.performer_in_video: hololive English -Myth- (Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
There's an answer out there somewhere
When the Muses whisper "Truth or dare?"
The hands of fate play tug-of-war
But no one's keeping score
Stay the course and be tenacious
'Cause the future is a game of chance
The chips are down, but I'm all in
I play until I win!
I'm not gonna give up now
The wheels of fortune circle back around
A new turn in the betting ring
A maze of outcomes drawn in golden string
And through this tangled thread
I see what's up ahead
A wild chase, a frantic pace
I got to try my luck, I'm spinning fate
